title: Manufacturing Engineer - Berger Paints - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Berger Paints - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
